name: Room Escape: Open Doors
short_description: Escape from the rooms. Open the doors in the rooms. Look for keys and solve puzzles. Get to the roof of the skyscraper.
detailed_description:
In the game you need to open the doors in the rooms. To do this, you must solve puzzles, look for a key or a secret code. In some levels, there are objects that can be collected and used. Sometimes you will have to combine objects with each other to solve the puzzle. You need to get to the roof of the skyscraper.

Click on the objects to add them to your set. Drag the object to an object or another object to use it. Click on the lock to open it closer and enter the code. Some objects can be examined by clicking on them.

By purchasing the game you will receive:

- an intellectual and entertaining game that requires active participation and the use of mental abilities.

- interesting gameplay with a variety of puzzles and interactions.

- a sense of satisfaction from solving complex problems and achieving the final goal.
